description_long: This is a rectangular table with a rich, medium-brown wooden top featuring a natural wood grain pattern. The tabletop is supported by two sturdy, black metal legs, each forming an inverted trapezoidal frame that provides both stability and a modern industrial aesthetic. The edges of the tabletop are straight and clean, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The table's design is minimalist, focusing on functionality and durability, making it suitable for urban environments such as cafes, parks, or communal workspaces. The materials and construction suggest it is robust enough to withstand frequent use in public or semi-public settings. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, blending wood warmth with industrial metal.
description: A modern rectangular table with a wood-grain top and black metal trapezoidal legs, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden tabletop and both black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the geometric shape of one metal leg.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and both supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the tabletop depth and the other metal leg.
